title: fsoc / treasury secretary / congressional testimony | Congressional Testimony | Statement from Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent Befor...
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent testified before the Senate Banking Committee on the FSOC 2025 annual report, introducing a new approach centered on economic growth and security. The testimony identified four priority policy areas: Treasury market resilience, cybersecurity threats, regulatory modernization for banks, and AI-related risks. Bessent criticized the previous regulatory approach under President Biden for focusing on "reputation risk" and "climate-related financial risks" rather than core safety and soundness issues, citing the 2023 bank failures as evidence of regulatory myopia.
